about.title: The Vision.
about.p1: RED Projects & Management is a consulting company specialized in Research, Engineering, and Development. We partner with technology companies to turn their most complex Software, Firmware, and systems challenges into market-leading reality.

rd_pm.desc: Full Software & System Development Life Cycle from Business case and requirement elicitation to product validation and customer delivery.

qa.desc: Test strategy from Initiation to full implementation on products and teams levels. Lead sustaining & Change Control board about customer issues and reports. Deploy Software KPI's and quality metrics.

nearshoring_dev.desc: Establish and sustain the release process, streamline teams work (Dev, QA, Ops), manage risks, manage stakeholder expectations and engage with customers.

nearshoring_support.desc: Cost savings, real-time collaboration, and access to skilled talents in Tunisia. We simplify compliance, ease of integration with internal teams, and strengthen operational resilience.

innovation.desc: We Introduce and engage with teams about IP and Patenting, trigger Awareness, Animate workshops, and Follow-up submissions with counsels then with local and European authorities.

contact.title: Let's Connect.
contact.p1: Expertise in R&D, Strategy, and Technical Orchestration. Partner with us to scale your technology.
